title: prompt_qa_fixture
description: Schema for prompt-QA fixture files under tests/prompts/<template>/<prompt>/<case>.json. Per SPECIFICATION/contracts.md §"Prompt-QA harness contract" (v014).

prompt_name.description: The REQUIRED-prompt name this fixture exercises.

schema_id.description: The named wire-contract schema replayed_response MUST validate against (or, when expected_schema_valid is false, MUST FAIL to validate against).

input_context.description: Variables the skill prose would pass to the prompt at invocation time. Shape is template-specific.

replayed_response.description: Canonical LLM-output JSON the harness asserts against.

expected_schema_valid.description: Whether replayed_response is expected to validate against schema_id. False reserved for negative-test fixtures.

expected_semantic_properties.description: Property names the harness MUST invoke against replayed_response via the per-template ASSERTIONS dict.
